description_zh: 快手搞的视频生成工具，国产里面算顶的。画面质量和运动连贯性都在线，关键是每天给66个免费积分，够你玩一阵子了。
description_en: Kling AI is Kuaishou's flagship video generation model. It produces some of the most realistic AI videos available today — smooth motion, consistent characters, and solid 1080p output. You get 66 free credits daily, enough for roughly 3-6 short clips per day.
pros_en: 66 free credits every day — no payment required
Produces 5-10 second clips at up to 1080p resolution
Image-to-video mode generates more realistic results than text-only
No VPN needed for users in China
cons_en: Free clips include a watermark (remove with paid plan)
Maximum clip length is 10 seconds on the free tier
Complex camera movements sometimes produce artifacts
Commercial use requires a paid subscription
tips_zh: 拿图片生视频比纯写文字效果好很多
提示词写细一点，把镜头运动说清楚
会员$8/月真心不贵
tips_en: Use image-to-video instead of text-only — the quality jump is significant
Be specific in your prompts: describe camera angle, motion, and scene details
At $8/month, the paid plan removes watermarks and unlocks longer clips
Compare with Hailuo AI (free, no watermark) if watermarks are a dealbreaker

description_zh: MiniMax家的，运动效果做得特别自然，是那种一看就不是AI生成的感觉。注册就送300积分，免费额度在同类里算大方的。
description_en: By MiniMax, natural motion effects that don't look AI-generated. 300 free credits on signup, generous for its category.
tips_zh: 注册先领300积分别浪费
人物走动、转头这类动作效果最好
做短视频素材挺合适的
tips_en: Claim 300 credits on signup
Best for human walking/turning motions
Good for short video content

description_zh: Luma出的，物理效果和光影做得特别逼真，一看就是那种「哦这个很厉害」的感觉。每月30次免费，够你尝鲜了。
description_en: By Luma, realistic physics and lighting. 30 free generations per month, enough to try it out.
tips_zh: 自然风景类的视频效果最好
提示词写好了真的能惊艳
做产品展示demo挺合适
tips_en: Best for nature/landscape videos
Good prompts can be stunning
Good for product demos

description_zh: AI 视频生成领域的先驱，Gen-3 Alpha 模型画质出色。每月125积分免费，够生成几个高质量短视频。专业创作者用得多。
description_en: Pioneer in AI video generation. Gen-3 Alpha model delivers excellent quality. 125 free credits monthly, enough for a few high-quality short clips. Popular among professional creators.
cons_zh: 免费只给一次性的125积分
tips_zh: 免费积分想好了再用，别浪费
Gen-3 Alpha模型效果最好
视频编辑功能也很实用
tips_en: Use free credits wisely
Gen-3 Alpha model is best
Video editing is also useful

description_zh: Pika 的视频生成以创意特效见长，能做各种风格转换和特效。免费额度每天重置，适合做短视频素材和社交媒体内容。
description_en: Pika excels at creative effects and style transfers. Free credits reset daily, good for short video content and social media material.
tips_zh: Pika Effects功能可以玩玩
短提示词效果反而更好
做表情包和短素材很合适
tips_en: Try Pika Effects feature
Shorter prompts work better
Good for memes and short clips

description_zh: OpenAI 出品的视频生成工具，已于2026年3月24日正式关停。Sora 2 曾于2025年9月发布，免费用户每天30个视频额度（后削减至6个），因定价过高（竞品3-10倍）最终停止运营。推荐替代：可灵AI、Hailuo。
description_en: OpenAI's video generation tool, officially shut down on March 24, 2026. Sora 2 launched Sep 2025 with 30 free videos/day (later cut to 6). Shut down due to pricing 3-10x above competitors. Alternatives: Kling AI, Hailuo.

free_credits.amount: 已关停（曾30个视频，后削减至6个）
free_credits.amount_en: Shut down (was 30 videos, later cut to 6)

cons_zh: 内测10个月错失市场窗口
tips_zh: 已关停，建议转向可灵AI或Hailuo
可灵AI：免费每天66积分，国产首选
Hailuo：免费每天100积分，画质不错
如果需要故事板功能，可以试试Runway
tips_en: Shut down — switch to Kling AI or Hailuo
Kling AI: 66 free credits/day, top Chinese AI video
Hailuo: 100 free credits/day, good quality
For storyboard features, try Runway

timeline.event_zh: Sora 首次公布技术预览
Sora 2 发布，叙事连贯性提升
timeline.event_en: Sora 2 launched with improved narrative coherence

timeline.event_zh: 免费额度从每天30个削减至6个
微软短暂提供Sora 2免费无限生成
timeline.event_en: Microsoft briefly offered Sora 2 free unlimited

description_zh: 小米自研的大模型，MiMo系列。新用户注册送大量算力，参与活动还能拿更多。用户实测：轻松拿到7亿token额度。
description_en: Xiaomi's self-developed LLM, MiMo series. New users get generous compute credits, plus more through activities.

activity.activity_zh: 新用户注册送算力，参与活动可获更多
activity.activity_en: Free compute on signup, more through activities

tips_zh: 注册后积极参与活动能拿更多算力
适合日常对话和代码辅助
tips_en: Participate in activities for more credits
Good for daily chat and code assistance

description_zh: 深度求索（DeepSeek）出的大模型，国产AI里的性价比之王。V4版本免费用，API价格只有GPT-4o的十分之一。编程和数学能力特别强，在多个评测里和闭源模型打得有来有回。国内能直接用，不用翻墙。
description_en: DeepSeek's flagship model, the cost-performance king of Chinese AI. V4 is free to use, API pricing is 1/10th of GPT-4o. Excellent at coding and math, competitive with closed-source models in benchmarks.
tips_zh: API调用性价比最高
复杂推理任务效果好
可以本地部署
tips_en: Best value for API calls
Great for complex reasoning
Can deploy locally

plans.features_zh: DeepSeek V4、R1推理模型、128K上下文、无速率限制
plans.features_en: DeepSeek V4, R1 reasoning model, 128K context, no rate limits

plans.features_zh: 无限对话、DeepSeek V4+R1、联网搜索、文件上传
plans.features_en: Unlimited chat, DeepSeek V4+R1, web search, file upload

description_zh: 阿里巴巴的大模型系列，从轻量级 0.5B 到旗舰级 235B 全覆盖。Qwen3 系列刚发布，开源模型里的全能选手。免费用，API也便宜。支持多模态（文字、图片、视频、代码），国内用户体验最好。
description_en: Alibaba's model family, from lightweight 0.5B to flagship 235B. Qwen3 series is the all-rounder among open-source models. Free to use, cheap API. Supports multimodal (text, image, video, code).
features_zh: 多模态支持（文/图/视频/代码）
cons_en: Reasoning not as good as DeepSeek
tips_zh: 新用户额度要尽快用完
阿里云用户有额外福利
适合企业级应用
tips_en: Use new user credits quickly
Extra benefits for Alibaba Cloud users
Good for enterprise

description_zh: 百度的旗舰AI助手，国内最早一批做大模型的。文心大模型4.5版本能力不错，深度搜索和文档处理是强项。免费版功能够用，和百度搜索生态深度整合。适合需要中文理解和搜索增强的用户。
description_en: Baidu's flagship AI assistant, one of the earliest Chinese LLM developers. ERNIE 4.5 has strong capabilities, excelling at deep search and document processing. Free tier is sufficient, deeply integrated with Baidu search.
tips_zh: 百度用户有额外福利
适合内容创作
tips_en: Extra benefits for Baidu users
Good for content creation

description_zh: 月之暗面出品，K2.6 模型主打编码和 Agent 能力。13小时不间断编码、300个子Agent并行作业，SWE-Bench Pro 得分 58.6。免费版每天有额度，够日常对话和轻量编码。
description_en: By Moonshot AI, Kimi K2.6 focuses on coding and agent capabilities. 13-hour non-stop coding, 300 sub-agents in parallel, SWE-Bench Pro score of 58.6. Free tier includes daily credits for chat and light coding tasks.
features_zh: 幻灯片/网站/文档/表格生成
pros_zh: K2.6 编码能力接近 Claude Sonnet
开源权重，可私有化部署
Agent Swarm 多智能体协同
pros_en: K2.6 coding performance near Claude Sonnet
cons_zh: 免费额度有限，重度使用需付费
复杂推理不如闭源顶级模型
API 按量计费成本不低
cons_en: Free tier limited, heavy use requires payment
Complex reasoning below top closed-source models
API pricing adds up for heavy use
tips_zh: 编码任务优先用 K2.6，比 K2 更稳
Agent Swarm 适合批量处理任务
免费额度日常聊天够用，编码省着点
搭配 Claude Code 用 K2.5 做轻量任务
tips_en: Use K2.6 for coding — more stable than K2
Agent Swarm is great for batch tasks
Free credits enough for daily chat, save for coding
Pair K2.5 with Claude Code for lightweight tasks

description_zh: 字节跳动出品，云雀大模型。2026年5月开始收费，68元/月起。免费版保留基础功能，付费版解锁高性能模式。
description_en: By ByteDance, Doubao LLM. Started charging in May 2026, from ¥68/month. Free tier keeps basics, paid unlocks high-performance mode.
cons_zh: 复杂任务不如专业工具
tips_zh: 抖音用户有额外福利
适合日常使用
tips_en: Extra benefits for TikTok users
Good for daily use

description_zh: 老牌 AI 编程助手，支持 70+ 编程语言，IDE 插件覆盖广。个人版完全免费，无限制使用。企业版有更多功能。
description_en: Established AI coding assistant supporting 70+ languages with broad IDE plugin coverage. Personal tier is completely free with no usage limits. Enterprise tier adds more features.
cons_en: May not be smart enough for large projects
tips_zh: 个人开发者首选
配合Copilot使用效果更好
设置里可以调灵敏度
tips_en: Best for individual developers
Works well alongside Copilot
Adjust sensitivity in settings

description_zh: 阿里巴巴的AI编程助手，深度集成在VS Code和JetBrains里。用的通义千问模型，中文编程体验好。个人免费用，企业版按席位收费。代码补全、Chat对话、代码解释、单测生成都支持。
description_en: Alibaba's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and JetBrains. Uses Qwen models, excellent Chinese coding experience. Free for individuals, enterprise by seat.
cons_en: English code not as good as Copilot
tips_zh: 阿里云用户首选
中文注释理解准确
tips_en: Best for Alibaba Cloud users
Accurate Chinese comment understanding

description_zh: 腾讯出的AI编程助手，和腾讯云生态深度整合。代码补全、Chat对话、代码审查都支持。个人免费用，企业版有更多功能。特别适合用腾讯云的团队。
description_en: Tencent's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with Tencent Cloud. Supports code completion, chat, and code review. Free for individuals, enterprise plans available.

activity.activity_zh: 新用户注册送免费额度

tips_zh: 腾讯云用户首选
新用户额度要尽快用
tips_en: Best for Tencent Cloud users
Use new user credits quickly

description_zh: 华为系开源终端AI编程助手，对标Claude Code。CodingPlan限时免费提供GLM-5.1、DeepSeek-V4-Flash、Qwen3全系列等国产顶级大模型，跑在昇腾芯片上，5小时滚动窗口计量，30天有效。
description_en: Huawei-backed open-source terminal AI coding assistant, competing with Claude Code. CodingPlan offers free 30-day access to GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series and more, running on Ascend chips with 5-hour rolling window metering.

free_credits.amount: CodingPlan Pro档限时免费，30天有效
free_credits.amount_en: CodingPlan Pro tier free for 30 days

activity.activity_zh: 限时免费领取CodingPlan Pro档，含GLM-5.1等顶级模型。每日限量，先到先得。
activity.activity_en: Limited time free CodingPlan Pro access with GLM-5.1 and top models. Daily quota, first come first served.

features_zh: GLM-5.1开源编码第一（Artificial Analysis评测）
智能Agent循环：自主读取、编辑、运行、检索、验证
8个内置代码工具：符号索引、调用链追踪、引用查找
5小时滚动窗口计量，使用灵活
华为昇腾芯片部署，无需翻墙
features_en: GLM-5.1 #1 open-source coding model (Artificial Analysis benchmark)
Pro tier: GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series
Smart Agent loop: auto read, edit, run, search, verify
8 built-in code tools: symbol indexing, call chain tracking
Runs on Huawei Ascend chips, no VPN needed
pros_zh: Pro档限时免费，含GLM-5.1顶级模型
模型阵容豪华，覆盖国内主流开源大模型
无需翻墙，微信扫码登录
昇腾芯片部署，算力成本低
pros_en: Pro tier free with GLM-5.1 top-tier model
Rich model lineup covering top Chinese open-source LLMs
Strong Agent capabilities, not just API wrapper
Ascend chip deployment, low compute cost
cons_zh: 每日免费名额有限，需抢
仅支持AtomCode客户端内使用，不支持第三方API
微信扫码登录，无其他登录方式
cons_en: Limited daily free quotas, need to grab early
WeChat login only, no other login options
tips_zh: 早上9点前去抢名额，成功率更高
首次启动欢迎界面可直接选Set up CodingPlan
也可输入/codingplan命令领取
Pro档额度约为Lite的5倍，建议直接领Pro
tips_en: Try before 9 AM for better chances at getting a quota
Welcome screen has direct 'Set up CodingPlan' option
Or use /codingplan command to claim
Pro tier has ~5x Lite quota, recommend claiming Pro directly

description_zh: 腾讯应用宝团队做的操作系统级AI助手，5月21日全量上线。每天送1000万Tokens，底层跑DeepSeek V4和混元大模型。支持Windows、Mac、安卓三端，有隐私模式（本地模型文件零上传）和效率模式（端云协同）两种运行方式。内置8个专项Agent，覆盖文件搜索、系统设置、远程控制、文档处理等场景。
description_en: Operating system-level AI assistant by Tencent's App Store team. Fully launched May 21. 10M free tokens daily, powered by DeepSeek V4 and Hunyuan models. Windows, Mac, Android. Privacy mode (local model, zero upload) and efficiency mode (cloud-edge). 8 built-in agents for file search, system settings, remote control, document processing.
pros_zh: 系统级Agent，能真正操作电脑
cons_zh: iOS版还没上线（预计6月中旬）
腾讯生态绑定，后续可能有变
tips_zh: 装好先选模式：敏感文件多选隐私模式，追求效率选效率模式
手机装Marvis扫码配对，就能远程操控电脑
1000万Tokens够聊5000轮对话，普通用户根本用不完
隐私模式用非敏感文件先测试，确认没问题再处理重要文档
tips_en: Choose mode on setup: Privacy for sensitive files, Efficiency for speed
Install Marvis on phone + scan QR to pair, enables remote PC control
10M tokens = ~5000 conversations, more than enough for daily use
Test privacy mode with non-sensitive files first before processing important docs

description_zh: AI编程IDE，市场份额31%排名第一。免费Hobby计划不用绑信用卡，Agent请求和Tab补全有限制。Pro版$20/月支持GPT-4o、Claude等前沿模型。
description_en: AI coding IDE, #1 market share at 31%. Free Hobby plan with no credit card required. Pro at $20/mo supports GPT-4o, Claude and more.
pros_zh: 市场份额最大，社区资源最多
pros_en: Largest market share, most community resources
tips_zh: 先用免费版试试再决定是否付费
Agent模式是核心功能
和Windsurf对比试试
tips_en: Try free first before paying
Agent mode is the core feature
Compare with Windsurf

plans.features_zh: 2000次补全/月、50次慢请求/月、基础模型
plans.features_en: 2000 completions/month, 50 slow requests/month, base models

plans.features_zh: 无限补全、500次快请求/月、所有模型、优先支持
plans.features_en: Unlimited completions, 500 fast requests/month, all models, priority support

plans.features_zh: Pro全部功能+组织管理+集中计费+SAML SSO
plans.features_en: All Pro features + org management + centralized billing + SAML SSO

description_zh: AI编程IDE，前身是Codeium。免费版$0/月，Light用量。Cascade功能支持多文件同时编辑。Pro版$20/月。
description_en: AI coding IDE, formerly Codeium. Free plan at $0/month with Light usage. Cascade feature for multi-file editing. Pro at $20/mo.
tips_zh: 和Cursor对比试试再选
Cascade是核心卖点
学生有折扣
tips_en: Compare with Cursor before choosing
Cascade is the key feature
Students get discount

description_zh: AI搜索引擎，搜索+阅读+总结一次完成。免费版每天有限次Pro搜索，普通搜索不限。Pro版$20/月，无限Pro搜索+文件上传。来源透明度最高。
description_en: AI search engine: search + read + summarize in one step. Free tier with limited daily Pro searches, unlimited basic search. Pro $20/mo. Best source transparency.
pros_en: Free tier enough for daily use
cons_zh: 中文内容索引不如国产工具
cons_en: Chinese content index weaker than local tools
tips_zh: 做研究和写报告首选
Pro搜索用在重要问题上
和Kimi配合使用效果更好
tips_en: Best for research and reports
Save Pro searches for important questions
Use with Kimi for better results

description_zh: Google出的AI研究工具，完全免费。每个笔记本最多50个来源，自动生成播客、视频解说、报告。2026年最被低估的免费AI工具。
description_en: Google's AI research tool, completely free. Up to 50 sources per notebook, auto-generates podcasts, video overviews, reports. Most underrated free AI tool of 2026.
pros_zh: 播客生成功能独一无二
tips_zh: 上传资料后先生成播客试试
适合学术研究和产品调研
和ChatGPT配合使用效果最好
tips_en: Try podcast generation first after uploading
Best for academic research and product analysis
Use with ChatGPT for best results

description_zh: AI图片生成工具，文字渲染最准。前Google Brain团队做的，2026年2月发布3.0版本。免费版每天约25张，没有水印。
description_en: AI image generation tool with best text rendering. By ex-Google Brain team, Ideogram 3.0 released Feb 2026. Free tier ~25 images/day, no watermark.
features_zh: 图片中嵌入文字（字体渲染强）
cons_en: Quality not as good as Midjourney
tips_zh: 需要带文字的图片首选Ideogram
提示词写具体效果更好
每天25张够个人用
tips_en: Ideogram is best for images with text
Specific prompts work better
25/day is enough for personal use

description_zh: 免费AI编程Agent，终端里用自然语言改代码。基于Codebuff付费版，用广告换免费额度。默认用DeepSeek V4 Flash，支持Kimi K2.6、MiniMax M2.7等国产模型。
description_en: Free AI coding agent that edits code via natural language in terminal. Based on paid Codebuff, ad-supported. Uses DeepSeek V4 Flash by default, supports Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7 and other models.
pros_zh: 内置代码审查和浏览器操作
pros_en: No config needed, works out of box
Built-in code review and browser use
cons_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro会用数据训练
cons_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro trains on data
tips_zh: 公司代码建议用V4 Flash而不是V4 Pro
用@filename引用特定文件
/init生成项目知识文件提高准确度
可以连接ChatGPT订阅增强深度思考
tips_en: Use V4 Flash not V4 Pro for company code
Use @filename to reference specific files
/init to generate project knowledge file
Connect ChatGPT subscription for deep thinking

description_zh: 谷歌的AI助手，集成Google搜索。2026年5月免费版引入百分比周限额，高峰期可用次数减少。付费版$19.99/月起。
description_en: Google's AI assistant with Search integration. Free tier introduced weekly percentage caps in May 2026. Paid from $19.99/month.
pros_en: Google Search integration for latest info
cons_en: Pro model hard to access for free users
tips_zh: 用Google AI Studio API代替App可绕过限流
避开太平洋时间高峰段使用
简单任务用Flash模型，省Pro额度
tips_en: Use Google AI Studio API instead of App to bypass limits
Avoid Pacific time peak hours
Use Flash model for simple tasks to save Pro quota
free_note: 免费版有周限额，高峰期受限
free_note_en: Free tier has weekly caps, peak hours limited

description_zh: 阿里的AI绘画工具，通义系列的图片生成模型。免费送500张/月，风格多样，中文提示词理解能力强，适合做海报和插画。
description_en: Alibaba's AI image generation tool. 500 free images/month, diverse styles, strong Chinese prompt understanding.
tips_zh: 用中文写提示词效果更好
人像写真功能很实用
搭配通义千问写提示词效果翻倍
tips_en: Chinese prompts work better
Portrait feature is very useful
Combine with Qwen for better prompts

description_zh: 字节跳动的AI图片生成工具，抖音系出品。每天免费送积分，图片质量高，支持文生图和图生图，风格偏年轻化。
description_en: ByteDance's AI image generation tool, part of the Douyin ecosystem. Free daily credits, high quality images.
tips_zh: 智能扩图功能很好用
用抖音账号直接登录
新手从模板开始更容易出好图
tips_en: Smart outpainting is very useful
Login with Douyin account
Start with templates for better results

description_zh: 国内最大的Stable Diffusion在线平台，模型库超丰富。每天免费送算力，可以在线跑SD模型，不用本地部署显卡。
description_en: China's largest online Stable Diffusion platform with massive model library. Free daily compute.
tips_zh: 先从热门模型开始试
社区有很多现成的工作流可以抄

description_zh: 百度的AI绘画平台，基于文心大模型。新用户送体验金，生成速度快，中文理解能力强，适合做营销素材。

tips_zh: 做营销海报很方便
新用户先用完体验金再说
中文描述比英文效果好
tips_en: Great for marketing posters
Use up new user credits first
Chinese descriptions work better

description_zh: 国产AI绘画工具，专注二次元和动漫风格。每天免费额度够用，风格偏萌系，适合做头像和壁纸。

tips_zh: 做头像壁纸效果最好
加二次元关键词效果翻倍
适合做微信头像和手机壁纸
tips_en: Best for avatars and wallpapers
Add anime keyword for better results
Perfect for WeChat avatars and phone wallpapers

description_zh: 海外热门AI绘画平台，每天免费150个token，能生成约15张图。模型种类多，支持Alchemy高清和ControlNet，社区模型库丰富。
description_en: Popular overseas AI painting platform, 150 free tokens daily (~15 images). Multiple models, Alchemy HD, ControlNet.
tips_zh: Alchemy模式画质最好
社区有很多免费模型可以白嫖
早上排队人少
tips_en: Alchemy mode gives best quality
Community has many free models
Less queue in the morning

description_zh: 免费的AI绘画工具，每天可免费生成500张图。支持SDXL和PXL模型，有滤镜和编辑功能，适合批量出图。
description_en: Free AI painting tool, 500 free images daily. Supports SDXL and PXL models, filters and editing.
tips_zh: 500张/天是目前最慷慨的免费额度
用SDXL模型效果最好
适合批量生成素材
tips_en: 500/day is the most generous free tier
Use SDXL for best results
Great for batch generation

description_zh: 微软的免费AI绘画工具，背后是DALL·E模型。每天免费100次加速生成，Microsoft账号登录即可用，不用翻墙。
description_en: Microsoft's free AI painting tool powered by DALL·E. 100 free boosted generations daily, login with Microsoft account.
tips_zh: 用微软Edge浏览器排队更快
DALL·E的中文理解能力一般，建议用英文提示词
Microsoft 365订阅用户有加速
tips_en: Use Microsoft Edge for faster queue
DALL·E Chinese understanding is weak, use English prompts
Microsoft 365 subscribers get speed boost

description_zh: Adobe的AI绘画工具，商用最安全。每月免费25个积分，生成的图片可商用，不用担心版权问题。集成在Photoshop里。
description_en: Adobe's AI painting tool, safest for commercial use. 25 free credits/month, commercially safe images.
tips_zh: 商用选Adobe最安全
搭配Photoshop效果翻倍
生成填充功能很实用

Combine with Photoshop for best results
Generative Fill is very practical

description_zh: 智谱AI的图片生成模型，在ChatGLM里直接用。每天免费额度，中文提示词理解能力强，适合做中文场景的图片。
description_en: Zhipu AI's image generation model, available directly in ChatGLM. Free daily credits, strong Chinese prompt understanding.
tips_zh: 用中文写提示词效果最好
适合快速出草图
搭配ChatGLM的对话功能更方便
tips_en: Chinese prompts work best
Great for quick drafts
Combine with ChatGLM conversation for convenience

description_zh: 开源AI编程助手，支持VS Code、JetBrains和命令行。不限定模型，可以对接Claude、GPT、Gemini等200+模型。免费使用，自带API Key就行。社区非常活跃，GitHub上星标破万。
description_en: Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI. Supports 200+ models including Claude, GPT, Gemini. Free to use with your own API key.
features_zh: 自动修复 Linter 错误
pros_zh: 完全开源免费，Apache 2.0 协议可商用
不锁定模型，自由选择最合适的
支持终端、编辑器、Web 多端
自动检查代码错误并修复
cons_zh: 需要自备 API Key，新手门槛稍高
复杂任务消耗 Token 快，需要关注账单
配置项多，初次上手需要学习
cons_en: Many config options, learning curve for beginners
tips_zh: 新手建议先用 Claude Sonnet 模型，性价比最高
在 .clinerules 文件里定义项目规则，效果提升明显
搭配 OpenRouter 可以用 200+ 模型，价格透明
tips_en: Start with Claude Sonnet for best cost-performance
Define project rules in .clinerules for better results
Use OpenRouter for 200+ models with transparent pricing

description_zh: 微软旗下的AI编程助手，深度集成在VS Code和GitHub里。代码补全、Chat对话、Agent模式全覆盖。学生和开源维护者免费，个人版$10/月。用的GPT-4o和Claude Sonnet模型。
description_en: Microsoft's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and GitHub. Code completion, Chat, and Agent mode. Free for students and OSS maintainers, $10/month for individuals.

activity.activity_zh: GitHub Education 认证学生免费使用 Pro 版
activity.activity_en: GitHub Education students get Pro free

pros_zh: VS Code 深度集成，体验流畅
学生和开源维护者免费用 Pro 版
同时支持 GPT-4o 和 Claude Sonnet
代码补全准确率业界领先
pros_en: Deep VS Code integration, smooth experience
Free Pro for students and OSS maintainers
Supports both GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet

Agent 模式只在 Pro 版（$10/月）
代码建议有时过于冗长

开源项目维护者也可以申请免费 Pro
补全不够用？试试 Copilot Chat 让它直接写代码
tips_en: Students: verify on GitHub Education for free Pro
OSS maintainers can also apply for free Pro
If completions run out, use Copilot Chat to write code directly

plans.features_zh: 2000次补全/月、50次聊天/月、GPT-4o/Claude 3.5 Sonnet
plans.features_en: 2000 completions/month, 50 chat messages/month, GPT-4o/Claude 3.5 Sonnet

plans.features_zh: 无限补全、无限聊天、所有模型、Copilot Chat
plans.features_en: Unlimited completions, unlimited chat, all models, Copilot Chat

plans.features_zh: Pro全部功能+1500次高级模型请求/月+GitHub MCP Server
plans.features_en: All Pro features + 1500 premium model requests/month + GitHub MCP Server

description_zh: OpenAI 的旗舰产品，全球用户最多的 AI 对话工具。免费版用 GPT-4o mini，Plus 用户用 GPT-4o 和 o3 推理模型。功能覆盖对话、画图、编程、数据分析。

free_credits.amount: GPT-4o-mini 无限 / GPT-4o 有限次

pros_zh: 用户量最大，生态最成熟
免费版已经很强，日常够用
多模态能力全面（文/图/代码/语音）
GPTs 市场有海量现成助手
pros_en: Largest user base, most mature ecosystem
Free tier is already powerful for daily use
cons_zh: 免费版 GPT-4o 用量有限
o1 推理模型需要 Plus（$20/月）
高峰期免费用户可能排队
国内需要特殊网络环境

Free users may queue during peak hours
tips_zh: 免费版够用就别急着升级 Plus
用 Custom GPTs 针对特定场景效率翻倍
上传文件让 ChatGPT 分析比手动复制粘贴方便多了
tips_en: Don't upgrade to Plus if free tier meets your needs
Custom GPTs dramatically boost efficiency for specific tasks
Upload files for analysis instead of copy-pasting

description_zh: Anthropic 出品，以安全性和长文本处理著称。免费版每天有消息条数限制，Pro 用户可用 Claude Code 做终端编程。代码能力在多个基准测试里排前列。
description_en: By Anthropic, known for safety and long-context processing. Free tier has daily message limits. Pro users access Claude Code for terminal-based coding. Top coding performance across multiple benchmarks.
pros_zh: 编程能力在评测里排名前列
Claude Code 命令行编程体验好
免费版 Sonnet 日常够用
pros_en: Claude Code CLI coding experience is excellent
Free Sonnet is sufficient for daily use
cons_zh: Opus 模型和扩展思考需要 Pro
国内访问需要特殊网络
cons_en: Limited daily uses on free tier
Opus and extended thinking require Pro
tips_zh: 长文档分析首选 Claude，200K 上下文不是盖的
用 Projects 功能给不同项目建独立空间

tips_en: Use Claude for long document analysis, 200K context is unmatched
Create separate Projects for different workflows
Claude Code is free CLI coding tool, better than ChatGPT for coding

description_zh: 目前最火的 AI 图片生成工具，画质和审美一直是行业标杆。免费试用额度有限，但出图质量确实值得付费。V7 版本效果惊艳。

艺术风格多样，出图好看

有独立网页版，不用 Discord 也能用了

需要一定提示词技巧才能出好图

Generation speed depends on plan tier

基础版 $10/月 足够个人使用，不用买更贵的
tips_en: Try Flux (free) first if budget is tight, quality is also great
Use --style raw to reduce Midjourney's style interference
Basic plan at $10/month is enough for personal use

Save free credits: use cheaper models for simple tasks
Search community Bots for specialized use cases

Professional and Premium plans offer more models and higher concurrency

不限请求次数：无忧版没有调用次数限制

description_en: Leading autonomous AI agent that independently browses the web, writes code, conducts research, and builds applications
